data.name: Scandinave
data.description: Bois blond, blanc chaud, lignes simples. L'essentiel, baigné de lumière.
data.mood: calm nordic simplicity, soft diffuse daylight, warm white walls, pale wood, uncluttered functional furniture, cozy hygge textures
signature: pale oak furniture with clean lines

data.name: Japandi
data.description: L'épure japonaise, la chaleur scandinave. Noyer, noir, silence.
data.mood: zen warm minimalism, hushed atmosphere, low warm light, disciplined negative space, low-slung curved furniture, japanese-scandinavian fusion

data.name: Bohème
data.description: Rotin, terracotta, lumière dorée. Des textiles superposés qui racontent un voyage.
data.mood: warm layered bohemian, golden-hour light, terracotta and sand tones, relaxed low seating, artisanal collected feel
signature: layered jute rugs and knit throws

data.name: Urban jungle
data.description: Des plantes partout, du bouclé crème, de la pierre claire. Une serre à vivre.
data.mood: fresh plant-filled modern boho, bright natural daylight, sage green and cream, curved bouclé furniture, lush trailing greenery everywhere
signature: abundant live plants including a plant wall

data.name: Mid-century
data.description: Noyer, courbes, laiton. L'élégance des années 50-60, remise au présent.
data.mood: retro 1950s-60s modern, walnut wood with tapered legs, mustard and burnt orange accents, warm brass lighting, nostalgic hi-fi comfort
signature: brass sputnik chandelier or arc floor lamp

data.name: Industriel
data.description: Brique, béton, acier noir, cuir camel. L'âme d'un loft d'atelier.
data.mood: raw loft atmosphere, exposed structure as decor, dramatic warm bulb lighting, bold contrast of black steel and cognac leather
signature: exposed brick or raw concrete wall
black steel beams and open shelving

data.name: Méditerranéen
data.description: Blanc chaulé, bleu d'Égée, terre cuite. La lumière du Sud, une maison de vacances.
data.mood: sun-drenched greek-island feel, whitewashed walls, cobalt blue accents, arched openings, breezy holiday lightness

data.name: Haussmannien
data.description: Moulures, point de Hongrie, cheminée en marbre. Paris, réinventé au présent.
data.mood: elegant parisian apartment, ornate cornices and ceiling roses, tall french windows flooding light, classical shell furnished with modern pieces
signature: ornate plaster mouldings and ceiling rose
modern furniture contrasting the classical envelope

data.name: Wabi-sabi
data.description: Plâtre brut, bois massif, lin froissé. La beauté de l'imparfait, le calme du vide.
data.mood: contemplative silence, hazy diffuse sunbeams, visible texture and imperfection, earthy monochrome, handcrafted organic forms

data.name: Quiet luxury
data.description: Bleu nuit laqué, bouclé, laiton discret. Le luxe qui ne dit pas son nom.
data.mood: hushed five-star suite, deep ink-navy and espresso tones, walls in lacquered panelling or rich dark paint, tonal layering, texture over pattern, jewel-like discreet lighting, tailored sculptural furniture, no clutter
signature: deep navy-blue lacquered boiserie or feature walls

data.name: Art déco
data.description: Vert émeraude, laiton, velours. Le faste géométrique des années 20.
data.mood: theatrical gatsby-era opulence, emerald and gold pairing, geometric glamour, warm brass lighting, bold curved silhouettes
signature: gold geometric wall linework with arches and sunbursts

data.name: Cottage anglais
data.description: Papier peint fleuri, boiseries sauge, meubles chinés. Le charme de la campagne anglaise.
data.mood: genteel english countryside nostalgia, floral-on-floral layering, soft daylight with small shaded lamps, collected-antique charm
signature: two-tone painted wainscot with dado rail

data.name: Dark academia
data.description: Boiseries sombres, cuir cognac, livres anciens. L'atmosphère d'une bibliothèque anglaise.
data.mood: nocturnal scholarly atmosphere, candlelight and low sconces, near-black walls with ornate cornices, moody antique elegance
signature: antique oil paintings in gilt frames

data.name: Désert
data.description: Plâtre sculpté, terre cuite, cactus. La sérénité minérale du Sud-Ouest.
data.mood: arid serene southwest desert home, intense direct sunlight and long shadows, sculpted plaster forms, earthy terracotta and sage

data.name: Seventies
data.description: Orange brûlé, velours côtelé, chrome. Le groove optimiste des années 70.
data.mood: groovy optimistic retro-pop, burnt orange first, sunny warm light with glowing glass globes, low modular seating, playful curves
signature: low tufted modular sofa in burnt orange

data.name: Color block
data.description: Arches peintes, duos de couleurs franches. Les murs deviennent un graphisme.
data.mood: playful graphic optimism, bright even daylight, giant painted color fields and arches, complementary color duos, rounded pill silhouettes
signature: supergraphic painted arches continuing onto the ceiling
complementary color pairing like orange and green
arched niches and painted door surrounds

data.name: Memphis
data.description: Terrazzo, zigzags, couleurs pop. L'exubérance ludique des années 80.
data.mood: playful 80s memphis pop design, toy-like geometric primitives, bright studio light, primary-plus-pastel color clash, cartoon energy

data.name: Maximaliste
data.description: Velours, galeries de cadres, couleurs saturées. Plus, c'est plus.
data.mood: exuberant more-is-more eclecticism, saturated complementary color clashes, dense curated collections, joyful pattern mixing
signature: velvet chesterfield sofa in a bold color
